text.title: Design Tokens: Output Examples and Integrations
text.summary: CSS custom properties output, Tailwind integration, Figma-sync CI workflow.

antipattern.description: Agents flatten the primitive→semantic→component hierarchy "for simplicity", removing the alias layer.
antipattern.reason: Without aliases, mode switching requires editing every component file instead of one semantic token file.

antipattern.description: Agents commit generated CSS into the same repo as sources.
antipattern.reason: On the next CI run the generated file matches HEAD and the repo is dirty. Add dist/ to .gitignore unless publishing from dist/.

antipattern.description: Agent updates dark mode tokens but forgets the light mode pair, breaking contrast.
antipattern.reason: Pair every mode change with an a11y check (axe, jest-dom). WCAG failures on one theme are invisible until tested.

text.reference: GitHub Actions workflow syncing Figma tokens.
